gxio_mica_pka_ring_config_t Struct Reference
[MiCA PKA Device API (gxio/pka.h)]

Describes how to configure a PKA engine's command result rings. More...


Data Fields

uint8_t num_rings
 The number of rings to make.
uint8_t ring_0_is_high_priority
 Whether to make the first ring high priority.
int ring_elem_size [PKA_NUM_RINGS]
 The size of the elements for each ring.

Detailed Description

Describes how to configure a PKA engine's command result rings.

Field Documentation

uint8_t gxio_mica_pka_ring_config_t::num_rings

The number of rings to make.

uint8_t gxio_mica_pka_ring_config_t::ring_0_is_high_priority

Whether to make the first ring high priority.

int gxio_mica_pka_ring_config_t::ring_elem_size[PKA_NUM_RINGS]

The size of the elements for each ring.

All elements in a particular ring must be the same size, but different rings may be different sizes.

The documentation for this struct was generated from the following file:
